prompt: Using the given mask image as reference, create an image of a person standing in a bookstore.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of an individual standing upright and centered within a cozy bookstore. The person's silhouette and full-body pose must precisely conform to image 1. The background should display rows of well-stocked bookshelves, illuminated by warm, natural light to create an inviting atmosphere.
objects: individual standing upright and centered (matching image 1 silhouette and full-body pose)
